campaigns.name: Meta Ads — RE Brokers/Agents
campaigns.statusNote: 10-12 ads ready. James uploading to Meta. Copy being fine-tuned. Hit go by end of week.
campaigns.strategy: Problem-state marketing: target people OPEN to selling but not actively looking for a realtor. Education angle, not solution-state. 80% of market with 3% of realtors focused on it.

campaigns.name: LinkedIn Prospecting
campaigns.statusNote: 30+ interested, 0 booked — on hold while Meta ads ramp up

campaigns.name: RE Brokers Cold Email (DEAD)
campaigns.statusNote: AIAA failed all 3 campaigns. 0% deliverability. Requesting $800 refund. Channel abandoned.

campaigns.name: Organic Content Engine
campaigns.statusNote: Content engine to feed social channels that ads run from. Ads need content on profiles to convert.

salesProcess.trainingVideos: ~2 hours on Skool (two sales processes from co-founders)
salesProcess.framework: Connect → Context → Intro → Frame → Discovery → Education Pitch → Push Away → Transition → Deliverables/Close → Objections (CIVR)
salesProcess.keyInsight: Problem-state marketing (80% of market, 3% competition) vs Solution-state (3-7% of market, 97% competition). Education angle headlines. AI agents get leads OFF Facebook fast to prevent competitor retargeting.
